name: Indian IT Sector (TCS/Infosys/Wipro)
summary: Day 63 Thursday. MAG 7 BEAT-AND-RAISE CAPEX ($630-650B 2026 AI COMMITMENT) STRUCTURALLY VALIDATES THE AI-INFRASTRUCTURE → INDIAN-IT-IMPLEMENTATION-SERVICES CHAIN; FOMC HAWKISH-SKEWED DISSENT REINFORCES US-RECESSION-RISK HEADWIND ON DISCRETIONARY SPENDING. Mag 7 prints (Meta $125-145B / Alphabet $180-190B / AWS $200B / MSFT capex +89% YoY) confirm AI-capex-thesis SURVIVED the OpenAI Q1 miss; SMH +1.7% recovers Apr 28 -3% selloff. The AI-infrastructure-build is durable, which feeds AI-implementation-services demand for TCS/Infosys/Wipro/HCL/TechM on a 2026 capex → 2027 services-growth lag. BUT FOMC hawkish-skewed dissent (3:1 hawkish-vs-dovish) + Powell 'energy inflation hasn't even peaked yet' = rate-cut catalyst pushed deeper into 2026 (CME FedWatch 0% Apr cut, 30% by Dec from prior 70% in Mar); US-recession-risk on discretionary IT spending intact. Q4 FY26 earnings weakness (Infosys, HDFC, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, HCL Tech -9%) remains the dominant DOMESTIC driver. TCS Q4 +25% operating margin + $2.3B annualized AI revenues showed AI materiality threshold crossed at the largest Indian IT vendor. Indian IT remains margin-pressure trade with AI-implementation upside on 2027 horizon. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Samsung Q1 prelim 57.2 trillion won ($37.9 billion) operating profit, +755% YoY. SMH $506.26 Tue flat 1D, +32.9% 1M — global AI capex thesis durable. The chip rally is INDEPENDENT of crisis: chip names would be up +20-30% 1M with crisis OR without crisis on Samsung/SK Hynix earnings cycle. CRITICAL: yesterday's Brent $100.47 print was yfinance contract-roll glitch; live tape Mon $108.23 / Tue $109.39 — oil REVERSED UP, not down. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
